title: The Shadow of Rosalie Byrnes
writer: Grace Sartwell Mason, R. Cecil Smith
actors: Elaine Hammerstein, Edward Langford, Anita Booth
plot: Leontine Maddern is a self-centered, unscrupulous actress, while her twin sister Leona is a serious and compassionate artist. Because of a scandal in which Leontine was involved, Leona uses her mother's maiden name of Rosalie Byrn...
